target: 6. Time Capsule Memo
I'm full now, so I'll go look for the memo in my room. Everyone wait here.
Shouldn't I help too? It'll be faster if we search together.
In that case, I'll help too.
No, I'm fine on my own. You guys just relax.
Why is she refusing? She should just let Mio help her.
I don't think Sis wants other people to see the inside of her room. It was super messy.
That girl...
Kaori-chan, is something wrong? You seem a bit restless.
Ah, I'm sorry. Um...
I'm not used to visiting a friend's house... So I'm not sure how I should be acting...
You don't have to worry about that. It's not a very fancy room anyway, so please just relax.
Y-Yeah...
(It really is Koyuba-san. I'm starting to remember things from the past...)
What's with you, Shin-chan, grinning like that.
Eh...? Was I making a face like that?
You were, you were. And while looking at Kaori-chan, too.
Eh... u-um...
Ah, hahaha... sorry. I was just remembering what Koyuba-san was like when we were kids.
That's kind of embarrassing... Because I was an inconspicuous, plain kid.
And now you're a popular idol, huh. I think that's truly amazing.
But, Kaori-chan, why did you decide to become an idol?
Y-Yeah... well, you see... How should I put it... I thought I needed to change myself.
The truth is, I'm very introverted... And that hasn't changed even now.
Is that so?
Yeah, it was always a complex of mine. So, I thought I'd use transferring schools as an opportunity to change this part of myself...
Even now, there are still many things I can't do well, but I do feel like I'm changing little by little.
Hehe, even now, before a live performance or something, my stomach still hurts sometimes, though.
Wow~, is that so... Being an idol really is tough, isn't it.
It's tough, but it's rewarding too. When people tell me I gave them energy, it makes me really happy.
It makes me realize that even I, who was always on the receiving end of energy, have become able to make people smile.
At times like that, I feel glad that I became an idol.
I plan to continue working hard as an idol from here on out. So please support me.
Yeah, of course.
Ah, if possible... Ajiro-kun too.
Yeah, of course I'll support you.
Thank you.
Hmm…
Ah, Kaori-chan, you remembered Shin-chan, right? Do you have any memories of him?
Memories with Ajiro-kun?
Yeah, like "we did this kind of thing". Or "we talked about that kind of thing".
We only really had light conversations when borrowing books.
I wasn't asking you, Shin-chan!
Wh-Why are you glaring at me!
Memories, huh... let's see...
I said I was always reading books in the library, right? Ajiro-kun used to come there a lot too.
Shin-chan has always read nothing but weird books since a long time ago, huh.
Weird books...
A lot of the books Ajiro-kun read were sci-fi, weren't they. They were all difficult books, and I thought it was amazing even though we were the same age.
I-Is that so...
One time, when I was agonizing over a puzzle book, Ajiro-kun called out to me...
While we were thinking about it together, you ended up getting more absorbed in it than I was, right? Saying things like, "Let's solve that book over there too!"
The two of us kept solving puzzles and riddles in the library until it got dark, didn't we.
Did that happen...?
Hehe, it did. After that, Hitobuchi-sensei found us.
We got a good scolding, and then she walked us home, you know? Don't you remember?
Ahh, that day! I remember going home with Butchi and Koyuba-san. So that's how that happened.
You've been unable to ignore people in trouble since way back then, huh.
Well... butting in on a puzzle might have been an unwanted favor, though.
That's not true. The solving method Ajiro-kun taught me was the catalyst that changed the way I think, or rather--
It felt like my perspective broadened. With that day as the catalyst, I started to look at myself objectively.
That's Shin-chan's specialty, "looking at the big picture"! That's amazing, Kaori-chan. Even I still can't do that at all.
You're easily lured in by whatever's right in front of you, Mio.
Eeh, is that so?
But, getting more absorbed in it than the person who was actually solving the puzzle, that really is a very Shin-chan-like story.
Hehe, it really is...
Everyone, got a sec?
What's up?
Did you find the time capsule memo?
Yeah, I found something that looks like it!
Eh!?
What do you mean? "Something that looks like it"?
It'll be faster if you just look at it. Here, it's this--
…What's this?
That's why this is what I was talking about earlier, "something that looks like it".
So it's something that looks like a memo for the time capsule...
This is it? Rather than a memo... doesn't it look like a map?
...Or rather, a code?
If it's a code, that's right up Shin-chan's alley. Do you know what this means?
Think about it calmly. The one who drew this was Ushio, you know.
Do you think Ushio could draw something as advanced as a code?
Ow!
Shinpei! If you say too much nonsense, I'm gonna hit you!
Don't say that *after* you hit me!
Seriously though, what is this.
Hmmm, this thing on the left is a tree, right?
Yeah, probably.
"Probably"? You're the one who drew it.
Did you say something?
I-I didn't say anything!
There are several trees lined up... And a line is extending from one of those trees.
And this one is... a cat, right? Hehe, it's cute.
Right~?
(Is this cute?)
Shinpei. Do you have some kind of complaint?
I haven't said anything!
Um, it looks like the cat is also connected by a line in the same way...
What is this round thing here that's connected to those lines? Do you not know either, Sis?
Ummm... what is this? Can you decode it, Shinpei?
You wrote it. You don't even know the contents of what you wrote yourself?
It can't be helped. I drew this a really long time ago.
Hey, isn't this a pebble?
Why do you think that?
I can't explain it well, but I just feel like Sis would draw a rock like this.
...As expected of sisters.
Then, assuming this is a pebble...
The tree, the black cat, and the pebble are connected by lines, and the thing in the center of that triangle--
Is this... a seashell?
Ah…
A seashell...? I wonder if it has something to do with the time capsule?
Mio, what do you think as a sister?
Even if you ask me that... Sis sometimes has ideas that are out of this world.
That's true…
Ow! Seriously, why are you hitting me!
Because you're saying things making fun of me!
Mio was the one who said it!
Are you telling me to hit my cute little sister! You monster!
So it's fine to hit me!?
You've built up a resistance to it, Shinpei. You've been getting hit constantly since way back when.
...Yeah, I suppose.
Shin-chan, I don't think you should just accept that, you know?
Ahaha, Ajiro-kun and Kofune-san really are close, aren't they.
Yeah, nothing's changed since the old days.
So, what do we do? For now, should we try looking for a tree, a cat, or a pebble?
That sounds like an endless task...
There are forests and mountains everywhere on the island, and stones and cats can move, after all.
More importantly, why is the location of the time capsule a seashell?
Normally it would be an X mark or something, right.
That's, well... it doesn't really matter, does it.
Like I said, that's enough about the minor details.
Anyway, we found a hint! Now all that's left is to take action!
That's why I'm telling you we don't know where we're supposed to go!
Action comes first! We just have to go around all the likely places on the island one by one.
Wandering around randomly isn't going to help, you know.
You overthink things, Shinpei. It's because you're always reading difficult books.
You don't think *enough*!
This again... You two fight too much.
They're really close, aren't they. Were they always like this?
Yes, they've been like this forever. Nothing has changed from two years ago.
I really wish they'd give it a rest...
Anyway, let's go! Mio and Kaori-chan, hurry up or we're leaving you behind!
Good grief... Are you okay with this, Mio and Koyuba-san?
Yeah! Let's go, Kaori-chan.
Right... Yeah, let's go.
